task: Unified all spoken announcements in the voice subsystem through a single `announce()` pipeline and changed the default voice from Samantha to Zarvox.
discussion_summary: The voice subsystem had multiple entry points for spoken notifications (quota warnings, permission prompts, session-done pings, etc.), each using different voice configurations. This session refactored all call sites to route through a single `announce()` function, eliminating the bare `speak()` import pattern. The user rejected Samantha as the default voice (citing similarity to Siri) and requested Zarvox instead, which was applied to single-voice mode while preserving the existing dual-mode behavior (Good News prefix + Zarvox body).

accomplishments.what: Refactored all spoken announcements to use unified `announce()` pipeline
Verified all bare `speak()` call sites eliminated and routed through `announce()`
Changed default single-voice mode from Samantha to Zarvox
Confirmed test suite passes after voice refactor
Committed and pushed voice unification (00bd902) and default voice change (80d2625)

decisions.decision: Default single-voice mode uses Zarvox instead of Samantha
decisions.reason: User preference: Samantha sounds too similar to Siri; Zarvox is the preferred default

decisions.decision: All spoken announcements route through unified `announce()` pipeline
decisions.reason: Eliminates inconsistent voice configuration across quota warnings, permission prompts, session-done pings, and other notifications

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Keep Samantha as the default voice for single-voice mode
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: defaulting to samantha will make it sound like siri, let's default to something else no G, for me zarvox works find as default as well

relational_files.why: Core voice pipeline; imported by stop.py, notification.py, and other hook modules
Uses announce() for session-done ping; refactored this session
Uses announce() for quota warnings and permission-prompt alerts; refactored this session
Defines default voice (VOICE_DEFAULT); changed from Samantha to Zarvox this session
Tests voice pipeline; verified passing after refactor
